plugins.name: codeguard
plugins.description: Automated code quality scanner — 80 rules across 8 dimensions with 0-100 scoring and prioritized fix suggestions. Covers Python, JS/TS, C/C++, GDScript, Go

plugins.name: clarifying-questions
plugins.description: Helps AI precisely understand user requirements by asking targeted clarifying questions before starting work

plugins.name: model-upgrade
plugins.description: Engineering framework that enables any AI coding assistant to achieve GPT/Claude parity through structured rules, test-feedback loops, task decomposition, and project context awareness
